name_en: M25445 White Ostrich. Inspired by Louis Vuitton trunks, this Slim Trunk handbag features ostrich leather with riveted borders and a metal S-lock, showcasing an avant-garde rock style. The glossy chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable, offering multiple carrying options. 23 x 12 x 4 cm (Length x Height x Width)
